hero.sub: A trusted local chauffeur south of Boston. Flat, all-in fares to Logan in Cadillac, Mercedes & Chevrolet luxury vehicles — punctual, discreet, 24/7 by reservation.

services.badge: Private Chauffeur Service · South of Boston
services.title: Chauffeured for Every Occasion
services.sub: Flat-rate Logan Airport transfers, hourly chauffeur, corporate travel and weddings — serving the towns south and west of Boston. No surge pricing, ever.

airport.title: Car Service to Logan Airport
airport.desc: Flat-rate transfers to Boston Logan (BOS) from $79 — tolls included, free flight tracking, up to 60 minutes of free wait on arrivals, and curbside pickup at every terminal. Manchester (MHT) & T.F. Green (PVD) by quote.

city.title: Point-to-Point Rides
city.desc: Professional point-to-point service across the South Shore and into Boston — dinner downtown, appointments, commuter connections — always one flat rate agreed before the car arrives.

hourly.title: Hourly Chauffeur
hourly.desc: Your car and driver by the hour — errands, meetings across town, a night at the Symphony, or a full day of appointments on your schedule.

event.title: Weddings & Events
event.desc: Elegant arrivals for the whole party — weddings, proms, anniversaries and corporate events with coordinated timing and a dedicated chauffeur who understands the day.

rates.title: One price. Confirmed in writing. No surge.
rates.sub: Every corridor town has a published flat fare to Logan. What you're quoted is what you pay — tolls included.
rates.note: Sedan pricing shown · SUV +$25 · tolls included · gratuity at your discretion

fleet.title: Immaculate, Late-Model Luxury
fleet.sub: Cadillac Escalade, Chevrolet Suburban, Mercedes GLE and Mercedes C300 — fully insured, immaculately maintained, driven by professionals.

howItWorks.title: Three Quiet Steps
howItWorks.step1Desc: Reserve online or by phone in under two minutes — pickup, drop-off, date and time. Your flat rate is locked the moment you book.
howItWorks.step2Desc: Written confirmation within 30 minutes with your price. We watch your flight and adjust your pickup automatically if it's early or delayed.
howItWorks.step3Desc: On time, professional, at your door — bags handled. Sit back; the price never changes en route.

serviceArea.title: The Old Colony Corridor, South & West of Boston
serviceArea.sub: Published flat rates to Logan from Canton, Dedham, Westwood, Norwood, Milton, Sharon, Stoughton, Walpole, Needham and Quincy. Trips beyond the corridor — Boston hotels, MHT, PVD, New England — quoted by phone.

testimonials.title: Trusted, Ride After Ride
testimonials.sub: Real reviews from our riders on Google — 5.0 stars, every one of them.

items.q: How do I book a ride?
items.a: Fill out the booking form above or call us at (781) 234-5451. We recommend booking 24 hours ahead for airport runs; same-day and early-morning rides are available whenever a vehicle is free.

items.q: How much is car service to Logan Airport?
items.a: Every corridor town has a published flat rate to Logan — from $79 by sedan (Milton, Quincy) to $105 (Walpole, Sharon), SUVs +$25. Tolls included, gratuity at your discretion, and the price never changes with traffic, demand or weather.

items.q: Do you track flights for Logan Airport pickups?
items.a: Yes. We monitor your flight in real time and adjust your pickup at no extra charge if your flight is delayed or lands early — with up to 60 minutes of free wait on arrivals. We pick up curbside at every terminal — A, B, C and E.

We publish flat rates for ten towns south and west of Boston — Canton, Dedham, Westwood, Norwood, Milton, Sharon, Stoughton, Walpole, Needham and Quincy. We're also happy to arrange trips throughout Greater Boston and New England on request.

items.q: Can I cancel or modify my booking?
items.a: Cancellations are free up to 24 hours before pickup; within 24 hours a 50% charge applies, and no-shows are billed in full. Call us anytime to modify a booking — we'll always try to accommodate.

pricing.answer: Every corridor town has a published flat rate to Logan — from $79 by sedan, tolls included, no surge ever. You'll find your town's exact rate on its page, or request a ride and we'll confirm your price within 30 minutes.

area.answer: We publish flat rates for ten towns south and west of Boston — Canton, Dedham, Westwood, Norwood, Milton, Sharon, Stoughton, Walpole, Needham and Quincy — plus trips throughout Greater Boston and New England on request. Don't see your town? Just call us.

human.answer: Of course! Call or email us anytime — we're available 24/7 and typically respond within minutes.

footer.tagline: Private car service to Boston Logan Airport — flat rates, luxury vehicles and a punctual local chauffeur serving the towns south and west of Boston. English & Français. 24/7 by reservation.
